scripts.compile:fingerprint: mkdir -p contracts/managed/data_fingerprint && compact compile contracts/data_fingerprint.compact contracts/managed/data_fingerprint
scripts.compile:bounty: mkdir -p contracts/managed/data_bounty && compact compile contracts/data_bounty.compact contracts/managed/data_bounty
scripts.compile:audit: mkdir -p contracts/managed/audit_proof && compact compile contracts/audit_proof.compact contracts/managed/audit_proof
scripts.compile:provenance: mkdir -p contracts/managed/data_provenance && compact compile contracts/data_provenance.compact contracts/managed/data_provenance
scripts.compile:escrow: mkdir -p contracts/managed/platform_escrow && compact compile contracts/platform_escrow.compact contracts/managed/platform_escrow
scripts.compile:all: npm run compile:fingerprint && npm run compile:bounty && npm run compile:audit && npm run compile:provenance && npm run compile:escrow
scripts.setup-local: git clone https://github.com/midnightntwrk/midnight-local-dev.git local-dev && cd local-dev && npm install
scripts.start-proof-server: docker rm -f midnight-proof-server 2>/dev/null; docker run --name midnight-proof-server -d -p 6300:6300 midnightntwrk/proof-server:8.0.3 -- midnight-proof-server -v && echo '✅ Proof server started at http://localhost:6300'
scripts.stop-proof-server: docker rm -f midnight-proof-server 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ Proof server stopped'
scripts.full-deploy: npm run start-proof-server && sleep 3 && npm run deploy
